notes: Data-model hygiene: 6 active read/write localStorage keys promoted from inline string literals to named constants. File scope: BURNDOWN_KEY ('dct_burndown_v1'), HANDOFF_NOTES_KEY ('phantom_handoff_notes'), RACK_VIEWER_LAST_KEY ('phantom_rack_viewer_last') — co-located after OPTIC_INV_KEY. IIFE scope: ACTIVE_AUDIT_KEY ('phantom_active_audit') inside AUDIT, GE_LAST_RACK_KEY + GE_LAST_FAULT_KEY ('ge_last_rack', 'ge_last_fault') inside GE. The BD IIFE's pre-existing internal const KEY now resolves to BURNDOWN_KEY rather than its own literal (single source of truth). Total: 17 inline literal sites replaced + 6 constant declarations. 6 cleanup-only / dev-only direct-string keys left inline (gt_lessons, phantom_seen_boot, phantom_force_lead_v1, phantom_identity, phantom_rm_last, __phantom_health) — naming a one-shot removeItem call is cosmetic. Zero behavior change. Cache bumped to flush v1.6.48 SW. Builds on v1.6.48 Phase 2 de-bloat.
